mapper.select:
WITH ZONES AS ( SELECT 'A' AS ZONE FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'B' AS ZONE FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'C' AS ZONE FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'D' AS ZONE FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'E' AS ZONE FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'F' AS ZONE FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'G' AS ZONE FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'H' AS ZONE FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'I' AS ZONE FROM DUAL ) SELECT Z.ZONE AS "zone", NVL(SUM(D.PHYSICAL_CNT), 0) AS "physicalCount", NVL(SUM(D.COMPLETED_CNT), 0) AS "completedCount" FROM ZONES Z LEFT JOIN (
UNION ALL SELECT SUBSTR(WS.WAREHOUSE_ID, 1, 1) AS ZONE, 1 AS PHYSICAL_CNT, 0 AS COMPLETED_CNT FROM IMPORT_MASTER IM JOIN WAREHOUSE_STOCK WS ON IM.IMPORT_NUMBER = WS.DECL_NO WHERE IM.STATUS = 'PHYSICAL'
AND IM.MOD_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND IM.MOD_DATE < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
UNION ALL SELECT SUBSTR(WS.WAREHOUSE_ID, 1, 1) AS ZONE, 1 AS PHYSICAL_CNT, 0 AS COMPLETED_CNT FROM EXPORT_MASTER EM JOIN WAREHOUSE_STOCK WS ON EM.EXPORT_NUMBER = WS.DECL_NO WHERE EM.STATUS = 'PHYSICAL'
AND EM.MOD_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND EM.MOD_DATE < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
UNION ALL SELECT SUBSTR(WS.WAREHOUSE_ID, 1, 1) AS ZONE, 0 AS PHYSICAL_CNT, 1 AS COMPLETED_CNT FROM IMPORT_MASTER_LOG IML JOIN WAREHOUSE_STOCK WS ON IML.IMPORT_NUMBER = WS.DECL_NO WHERE IML.ACTION_TYPE = 'INSPECTION_COMPLETED'
AND IML.ACTION_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND IML.ACTION_DATE < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
UNION ALL SELECT SUBSTR(WS.WAREHOUSE_ID, 1, 1) AS ZONE, 0 AS PHYSICAL_CNT, 1 AS COMPLETED_CNT FROM EXPORT_MASTER_LOG EML JOIN WAREHOUSE_STOCK WS ON EML.EXPORT_NUMBER = WS.DECL_NO WHERE EML.ACTION_TYPE = 'INSPECTION_COMPLETED'
AND EML.ACTION_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND EML.ACTION_DATE < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
) D ON Z.ZONE = D.ZONE GROUP BY Z.ZONE ORDER BY Z.ZONE

SELECT -- 국내 창고 재고 수 NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN POSITION_AREA = 'LOCAL' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "localCount", -- 보세 창고 재고 수 NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN POSITION_AREA = 'BONDED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "bondedCount", -- 조건에 맞는 전체 현존 재고 수 COUNT(*) AS "totalCount" FROM WAREHOUSE_STOCK WHERE OUT_DATE IS NULL
AND DECL_NO LIKE 'IMP-%'
AND DECL_NO LIKE 'EXP-%'
AND REG_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND REG_DATE < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1

SELECT -- 1번 차트: 단계별 진행 현황 NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN ACTION_TYPE = 'WAITING' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "waitingCount", NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN ACTION_TYPE = 'SUPPLEMENT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "supplementCount", NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN ACTION_TYPE = 'ACCEPTED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "acceptedCount", NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN ACTION_TYPE = 'PAY_WAITING' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "payWaitingCount", NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN ACTION_TYPE = 'RELEASE_APPROVED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "releaseApprovedCount", NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN ACTION_TYPE = 'INSPECTION_COMPLETED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "inspectionCompletedCount", NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN ACTION_TYPE = 'DELIVERED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "deliveredCount",
-- 2번 차트: 반출 차단 건수 (승인 건수는 위에서 구한 releaseApprovedCount 재활용) NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN ACTION_TYPE = 'RELEASE_REJECTED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "releaseRejectedCount" FROM (
UNION ALL SELECT ACTION_TYPE FROM IMPORT_MASTER_LOG WHERE 1=1
AND ACTION_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND ACTION_DATE < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
UNION ALL SELECT ACTION_TYPE FROM EXPORT_MASTER_LOG WHERE 1=1
AND ACTION_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND ACTION_DATE < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
)

SELECT NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN STATUS = 'WAITING' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "waiting", NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN STATUS = 'REVIEWING' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "reviewing", NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN STATUS = 'PHYSICAL' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "physical", NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN STATUS = 'SUPPLEMENT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "supplement", NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN STATUS = 'ESCALATED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "escalated", NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN STATUS = 'ACCEPTED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "accepted", NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN STATUS = 'REJECTED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "rejected", NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN STATUS = 'PAY_WAITING' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "payWaiting", NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN STATUS = 'PAY_COMPLETED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "payCompleted", NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN STATUS = 'WH_IN_APPROVED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "whInApproved", NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN STATUS = 'WH_IN_REJECTED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "whInRejected", NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN STATUS = 'RELEASE_APPROVED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "releaseApproved", NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN STATUS = 'RELEASE_REJECTED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "releaseRejected", NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN STATUS = 'APPROVED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "approved", NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN STATUS = 'DELIVERED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "delivered" FROM (
UNION ALL SELECT STATUS FROM IMPORT_MASTER WHERE 1=1
AND SUBMIT_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND SUBMIT_DATE < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
UNION ALL SELECT STATUS FROM EXPORT_MASTER WHERE 1=1
AND SUBMIT_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND SUBMIT_DATE < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
)
